subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-07-03
subcodes.first_line: The Kingdom of God is pre-existent and, since He is the Creator; without doubt He has always had a creation.
subcodes.first_line_orig: سلطنت الهی قدیم است و مادام خالق بوده خلق هم داشته
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @creation of the world, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness, @infinity and eternity
